name: prunaai-p-video-generator
description: Generate videos with prunaai/p-video from a local script and save the outputs in the workspace.

interface.longDescription: Use the bundled local script to generate a video with the prunaai/p-video model on Replicate and save both the video and prediction metadata into the workspace. Supports text-to-video, optional image-to-video, and optional audio-to-video inputs.
defaultPrompt: Generate a 5-second cinematic stunt video in 16:9
Animate a product photo into a short ad clip with p-video
Create a vertical social video and save it locally
